name: erpnext-lead-scraper
description: Monorepo runner for backend, api, frontend, and python scraper/scheduler

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:api && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:ui
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:single: concurrently -k -n frontend-build,backend -c magenta,green "npm run build:frontend:watch" "set NODE_ENV=production&& npm run dev:backend"
scripts.start:single: npm run build:frontend && set NODE_ENV=production&& npm run start:backend
